content: Explore existing Stylist.jsx STT/TTS flow + backend speech endpoints
Create /app/frontend/src/lib/speech.js (Web Speech API wrapper with feature detection)
Add skip_tts flag to backend stylist route
Refactor Stylist.jsx to use local STT with graceful Groq fallback
Refactor Stylist.jsx to use local TTS with graceful Deepgram fallback (locale-aware voice)
Add i18n keys for speech UI states (mic on/off, unsupported, etc.)
Backend smoke test: stylist skip_tts path returns no audio
Call testing_agent for full Phase M backend validation
Update plan.md Phase M status to COMPLETED
